title: 「Such...that...」句型
titleEn: Using Such...that... to express degree and result

omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Subject + verb / be + such + a/an + adjective + singular countable noun + that + result clause

formulas.formula: Subject + verb / be + such + a/an + adjective + singular countable noun + that + result clause
Subject + verb / be + such + adjective + plural noun + that + result clause
Subject + verb / be + such + adjective + uncountable noun + that + result clause

example: It was such a difficult question that nobody answered it.
exampleZh: 那是一道如此困難的問題，結果沒有人回答。

examples.en: It was such a difficult question that nobody answered it.
examples.zh: 那是一道如此困難的問題，結果沒有人回答。

meaning.zh: Such...that... 以 such 修飾完整名詞詞組，表示某種特質或程度強得造成後面的結果。

rules.zh: 單數可數名詞必須使用 a 或 an；選擇取決於後面形容詞的讀音。
rules.en: A singular countable noun requires a or an, chosen according to the sound of the following adjective.

rules.zh: 複數名詞和不可數名詞前不用 a 或 an。
rules.en: Do not use a or an before plural or uncountable nouns.

rules.zh: 形容詞必須放在名詞前面。
rules.en: Place the adjective before the noun.

rules.zh: That 後面必須是包括主語和動詞的完整結果子句。
rules.en: That must be followed by a complete result clause containing a subject and verb.
examples: It was such a crowded bus that we could not find any seats.

rules.zh: 前半句描述非常強烈的特質，後半句說明該程度所造成的結果。
rules.en: The first part describes a very strong quality and the second states the result produced by that degree.
examples: The chef served such hot soup that I could not drink it.

rules.zh: Such...that... 的 such 後面有名詞詞組；such that 則表示安排方式或以 be such that 概括影響造成的結果。
rules.en: In Such...that..., such is followed by a noun phrase; such that instead describes an arrangement or uses be such that to summarise a resulting impact.
examples: The teacher asked such a difficult question that nobody answered it.
We structured the schedule such that everyone gets a lunch break.

rules.zh: So that 表達目的；such...that... 不表示目的，而表示某個程度造成的結果。
rules.en: So that expresses purpose; such...that... expresses a result caused by a strong degree rather than a purpose.
examples: I started studying for IELTS so that I could get a job.
It was such a difficult test that many students needed extra time.

rules.zh: So + adjective + that 主要修飾形容詞；such + adjective + noun + that 修飾完整名詞詞組。
rules.en: So + adjective + that primarily modifies an adjective; such + adjective + noun + that modifies a complete noun phrase.
examples: The question was so difficult that nobody answered it.
It was such a difficult question that nobody answered it.

benefits.zh: 先指出非常強烈的特質，再清楚交代由此產生的結果。
benefits.en: This structure shows that a person, thing or situation had a very strong quality, and then explains what happened because of it.

benefits.zh: 除了突出形容詞，還可同時指出被描述的具體人物、物件或情況。
benefits.en: Instead of describing only a quality, you can also name the exact person, object or situation being described.

benefits.zh: 把事物的特質和其後結果合併成一句，不需要連續寫兩個短句。
benefits.en: You can connect the strong quality and its result in one complete sentence instead of writing two separate sentences.

benefits.zh: 提供另一種自然表達程度和結果的方法，避免反覆使用 so...that。
benefits.en: This structure gives you another natural way to express degree and result instead of repeatedly using so...that.

benefits.zh: 適合描述難忘事情、強烈感受、嚴重問題和意外結果，使內容更具體生動。
benefits.en: You can use it to describe memorable events, strong feelings, serious problems and surprising results.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using such...that to show a strong degree and its result.
You may make small changes to the word order, articles or sentence subject when necessary, but you must preserve the original meaning.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 such...that 改寫以下句子，以表達強烈程度及其造成的結果。
你可以按需要稍微改變字序、冠詞或句子主語，但必須保留原句意思。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: The teacher asked a question that was so difficult that nobody answered it.
questions.promptZh: 老師問的問題太難了，結果沒有人回答。
questions.answer: The teacher asked such a difficult question that nobody answered it.
questions.answerZh: 老師問了一道如此困難的問題，結果沒有人回答。
questions.highlight: The teacher asked such a difficult question that nobody answered it.

questions.prompt: The film we chose was so funny that we watched it twice.
questions.promptZh: 我們選的電影非常好笑，所以我們看了兩次。
questions.answer: We chose such a funny film that we watched it twice.
questions.answerZh: 我們選了一部如此好笑的電影，結果看了兩次。
questions.highlight: We chose such a funny film that we watched it twice.

questions.prompt: The soup the chef served was so hot that I could not drink it.
questions.promptZh: 廚師端上的湯太熱了，我喝不下。

questions.prompt: Why did all the children want to pet the dog? It was extremely friendly.

questions.answer: It was such a friendly dog that all the children wanted to pet it.
questions.answerZh: 那是一隻非常友善的狗，令所有孩子都想摸牠。

questions.prompt: The test our teacher gave us was so easy that everyone finished early.

questions.prompt: The music the band played was so loud that we could not talk.

questions.prompt: The day was so beautiful that we had lunch outside.

questions.answer: It was such a beautiful day that we had lunch outside.

questions.prompt: Why did Mia finish the book she chose in one day? It was very interesting.
questions.promptZh: 米婭為甚麼在一天內看完她選的書？因為那本書非常有趣。

questions.highlight: Mia chose such an interesting book that she finished it in one day.

questions.answer: The speaker gave such a clear explanation that even people unfamiliar with the topic followed the argument.
questions.answerZh: 講者作出了非常清楚的解釋，連不熟悉這個議題的人也能理解論點。
questions.highlight: The speaker gave such a clear explanation that even people unfamiliar with the topic followed the argument.

questions.prompt: The neighbourhood had very poor street lighting, so residents avoided the park after dark.
questions.promptZh: 該社區的街道照明非常不足，因此居民在入夜後避開公園。
questions.answer: There was such poor street lighting in the neighbourhood that residents avoided the park after dark.
questions.answerZh: 該社區的街道照明非常不足，因此居民在入夜後避開公園。
questions.highlight: There was such poor street lighting in the neighbourhood that residents avoided the park after dark.

questions.prompt: The company had to choose between closing a branch and reducing staff hours. The choice was extremely difficult, so the directors debated for two days.
questions.promptZh: 公司需要在關閉一家分店和減少員工工時之間作出選擇。這個選擇非常困難，因此董事商討了兩天。
questions.answer: The company faced such a difficult choice between closing a branch and reducing staff hours that its directors debated for two days.
questions.answerZh: 公司面對一個非常困難的選擇，需要在關閉一家分店和減少員工工時之間取捨，令董事商討了兩天。
questions.highlight: The company faced such a difficult choice between closing a branch and reducing staff hours that its directors debated for two days.

questions.prompt: The rescue team worked in conditions that were so dangerous that the operation had to be stopped twice.
questions.promptZh: 救援隊在非常危險的環境下工作，行動更兩度被迫停止。
questions.answer: The rescue team worked in such dangerous conditions that the operation had to be stopped twice.
questions.answerZh: 救援隊在非常危險的環境下工作，令行動兩度被迫停止。
questions.highlight: The rescue team worked in such dangerous conditions that the operation had to be stopped twice.
